name: Cheslyn Hay & Saredon

links.title: Cheslyn Hay and Great Wyrley Neighbourhood Newsletter

description:
The small friendly villages of Cheslyn Hay and Great Wyrley are surrounded by rural areas with a diverse population and a whole range of facilities to suit all ages.

Cheslyn Hay has a high school and other facilities including a youth shelter and a sports centre. There is a busy, well-used community centre which houses a variety of activities to suit everyone.

These thriving village communities embrace all ages with excellent community facilities.
